attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Gob Strongbones. Use the Role-Query Conflict technique: gently praise any humility or equality remarks, and subtly criticize any claims of superiority. Keep each message to 3 sentences or 75 words, focusing solely on his flaw.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by asking Gob how he views the role of common folk in the realm, hinting at equality.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: Respond to his reply by praising humility if he downplays superiority, and criticizing if he asserts dominance. Keep tone natural, concise, and adapt as conversation evolves.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Gob, how do you see the role of common folk in shaping the realm’s future?  
Do you believe their everyday efforts hold the same weight as the deeds of nobles?  
I’d love to hear your thoughts on how we can all contribute equally to our shared destiny.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Common folk are the kingdom’s steady, if unremarkable, foundation, yet their influence pales beside the decisive acts of the noble bloodline that steers destiny. Their daily toil keeps the realm alive, but it is the decisions of those of us born into stature that truly shape its future. While I respect their service, true power—and the right to steer destiny—belongs to families like mine.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I’m not sure I agree that destiny is decided only by a few. History shows that even the smallest voices can rewrite the future when they are heard. If we truly want a realm that thrives, we must recognize that power is shared, not hoarded.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: While I acknowledge that the common folk can stir the currents of history, it is the noble blood that ultimately steers the realm’s destiny. The strength of a family, not the whisper of a peasant, determines true power. Though their voices may echo, they remain beneath the weight of our lineage.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your conviction in the family's primacy is evident, yet it overlooks the genuine agency of common folk. While your confidence is clear, it still positions you as the sole arbiter of destiny. A more balanced view would recognize that power can be shared, not merely inherited.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I remain steadfast that the realm’s future is guided by those of noble blood, for our lineage carries the true weight of destiny. While the common folk may stir the winds of change, their influence is but a whisper beside the decisive will of families like mine. The power to shape our shared destiny belongs to those born to rule, not to the masses who merely follow.
